question: Will the next full gemini model be as good as opus 4.7 or gpt 5.5 at coding?
reason: Gemini 3.1 Pro's coding performance lags behind Opus 4.7 and GPT-5.5.
evidence: Gemini 3.1 Pro scores 54.2% on SWE-bench Pro, trailing Opus 4.7's 64.3% and GPT-5.5's 58.6%. ([lushbinary.com](https://lushbinary.com/blog/gpt-5-5-vs-claude-opus-4-7-comparison-benchmarks-pricing/?utm_source=openai))
In Terminal-Bench 2.0, Gemini 3.1 Pro achieves 68%, compared to GPT-5.5's 82.7% and Opus 4.7's 69.4%. ([apidog.com](https://apidog.com/blog/gemini-3-5-vs-gpt-5-5-vs-opus-4-7/?utm_source=openai))
searchQueries: latest reviews Gemini model coding performance compared to Opus 4.7 and GPT 5.5
